name: Threshold Rituals
mini_version: Compact ring dish and bud-vessel pair for narrow shelves and travel gifting.
xl_version: Entryway catchall and display-riser editions, released only after stability and resin-cost validation.
bundle_edition: Seven-object Threshold Rituals digital collection with coordinated dimensions and display guidance.
premium_edition: Enhanced relief set with presentation renders, print profiles, alternate bases, and verified support layouts.
commercial_license_edition: Time- and volume-limited right to sell physical prints, subject to reviewed terms.
future_physical_product: Small-batch cast-resin or mineral-composite ring dish after material and compliance review.

change_history.change: Created low-confidence launch hypothesis from Etsy and Cults3D evidence.
